questions.question: What type of mirror reflects light without scattering?
questions.explanation: According to Section 1, Specular reflection is the type of mirror that reflects light without scattering.

questions.question: What is the effect on a hair strand when it becomes positively charged?

options.A: It stands up due to electrostatic force
options.B: It falls down due to gravity
options.C: It remains still due to balance of forces
options.D: It vibrates due to electromagnetic induction

questions.explanation: According to Section 6, when a hair strand becomes positively charged, it stands up due to electrostatic force.

questions.question: What happens when two plane mirrors are placed at an angle of 90 degrees?

options.B: Two images are formed, one behind the other

questions.explanation: According to Section 4, when two plane mirrors are placed at an angle of 90 degrees, infinite images are formed.

questions.question: What is the formula for calculating the focal length of a convex mirror?
questions.explanation: According to Section 3, the formula for calculating the focal length of a convex mirror is f = -d/2.
